name: Medi-Van Of Green Bay
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for MEDI-VAN, MEDIVAN, or MEDI VAN in Wisconsin (only one MEDIVAN found, located in Knightdale, NC - USDOT 4470876, does not match). WI DFI Corporate Records search for 'medi-van' and 'medi van' returned zero matches; likely a sole proprietorship / DBA / trade name not registered as an entity. Business is listed as a medical transport company at 1846 Industrial Dr, Green Bay WI 54302 with phone (920) 465-4488 per Yellow Pages and goservices.com listings. Yelp lists alt address 2525 Industrial Dr.

name: Essential Transportation LLC
notes: FMCSA SAFER search for 'ESSENTIAL TRANSPORTATION' returned 11 carriers nationwide but NONE in Poughkeepsie or anywhere in New York. Two FL/CA/WA/MN/IL/PA/TN/GA matches reviewed - none match 3 Neptune Rd, Poughkeepsie NY 12601. NY DOS public inquiry portal was inaccessible (socket errors) for direct entity lookup. A separate entity 'Proficient Transportation LLC' at 16 Allen Place, Poughkeepsie was found but is not the target company. No state registry record could be confirmed; entity may be very small / dormant / use trade name.

name: Platinum Limousines Tampa
notes: FMCSA SAFER search for 'PLATINUM LIMOUSINES' found only Zeeland MI (USDOT 2558636) and Murfreesboro TN (USDOT 1695881) - neither in Tampa FL. Broader 'PLATINUM LIMO' search in FL found PLATINUM LIMO BUS SERVICE LLC in Hollywood FL (USDOT 1473607) - wrong city. No 'PLATINUM' carrier in Tampa found in SAFER. Sunbiz portal returned 403 to direct lookups; a 'PLATINUM LIMOUSINE LLC' entity (L21000039988) appears in Sunbiz officer/agent index but state/city not confirmed via this research. 5242 Belle Chase Cir, Tampa 33634 is a residential-style address; likely small operator without USDOT or operating under DBA.

name: Universal Cab & Limo
notes: FMCSA SAFER search for 'UNIVERSAL CAB' found only UNIVERSAL CAB CO INC in Ashburn VA (USDOT 1382842) - not South Bend IN. 'UNIVERSAL LIMO' search returned only UNIVERSAL LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION CO in West Sacramento CA (USDOT 620177). No SAFER carrier match in South Bend / Indiana. INBiz business entity search portal does not expose direct query URLs; was inaccessible for programmatic lookup. Industry searches for South Bend taxi/limo predominantly return 'United Cab South Bend' (different company). PO Box 215, South Bend IN 46624 suggests very small operator; entity may be dormant or operating under DBA.

name: Chic Limousine Svc
notes: FMCSA SAFER search for 'CHIC LIMOUSINE' returned 3 carriers: USDOT 2539827 (Houston TX), USDOT 1047757 CHIC LIMOUSINE SERVICES INC (Maryland Heights MO), USDOT 2849787 (Sunnyvale CA). None located in Jacksonville FL. CHIC LIMO and CHIC LIMOU searches returned no records. Yelp explicitly marks 'CHIC LIMOUSINE SERVICE' in Jacksonville as CLOSED, supporting inactive/out-of-business status. Sunbiz direct lookups returned 403; entity status cannot be confirmed via state registry in this pass but business appears no longer operating at 6042 Ribault Rd, Jacksonville FL 32209.
